candidate_post.title: למה פיליפינים ולא יוון? 10 מספרים
candidate_post.selection_basis: No calendar entry exists for 2026-06-07 (calendar Week 1 ends Jun 5, Week 2 begins Jun 8). Per the fallback rule 'post next unpublished in sequence': posts 1 and 2 are published, so POST 3 is next in line. The calendar's next scheduled IL slot is Sunday 2026-06-08 (POST 4).

decision: HOLD - did not publish. No browser action taken. No action of any kind taken on Blueprint Building Group.
block_reasons: STANDING BLOCKER (campaign_state.json, severity MEDIUM): 'Future Hebrew community posts need Brand Guard review. Community posts 3-50 are held as drafts because they were authored before the current Israeli currency, CTA, legal ownership, and register rules.' POST 3 is inside the held 3-50 range and has not been cleared back into the executable queue. This blocker is still listed as open.

UNRESOLVED CURRENCY CONFLICT: CLAUDE.md and the scheduled-task instructions mandate shekels only for Israeli content (Villa D 1,535,000 ש"ח, Villa C 1,650,000 ש"ח, reservation 9,999 ש"ח). campaign_state.json (last_updated 2026-06-04) mandates the opposite: pricing_rule 'php_only_all_markets', israel currency 'PHP_ONLY', reservation 'PHP 200,000', and 'Do not state ILS, USD, or recalculated monetary amounts in Israeli content.' POST 3 prices in shekels, which satisfies CLAUDE.md but violates campaign_state.json. The two authoritative rule sets directly contradict and a single post cannot satisfy both. This conflict must be resolved by a human / Claude Code before any priced IL post can publish.

SECONDARY currency note on POST 3 under the strict CLAUDE.md reading: the copy cites USD macro figures (OFW 35.63 מיליארד דולר, BPO 40 מיליארד דולר) and a EUR-to-ILS conversion (250,000 אירו, כ-960,000 ש"ח). These are economic-context figures, not property prices, but CLAUDE.md Rule 1 ('No PHP. No USD.') is absolute, so this is an additional reason the draft needs Brand Guard sign-off rather than auto-publish.
consistency_with_prior_runs: Same determination as 2026-06-04, 2026-06-05, and 2026-06-06 IL runs, all of which held for the identical standing-blocker + currency-conflict reasons. Nothing in campaign_state.json has changed to clear these blockers since.

rule_checks_on_candidate.three_legal_solutions: PASS (99-year leasehold, Deed of Assignment, Domestic Corporation 60/40 all present)
rule_checks_on_candidate.currency_rule: CONFLICTED (compliant with CLAUDE.md shekel rule, non-compliant with campaign_state.json PHP-only rule)
rule_checks_on_candidate.shabbat_check: PASS (2026-06-07 is Sunday, a valid Israeli posting day)

next_action: Before the next IL slot (Sunday 2026-06-08, POST 4): (1) resolve the shekel-vs-PHP currency rule conflict between CLAUDE.md and campaign_state.json, and (2) run posts 3-50 through Brand Guard and return approved drafts to the executable queue. If both are unresolved by Jun 8, hold again and report.
notes: Per scheduled-task instruction ('If a platform block appears or anything is ambiguous, stop and report rather than guessing') and CLAUDE.md ('If a task violates any rule, mark it NEEDS_CLARIFICATION and skip it'), no Facebook action was taken.
No Chrome connection was attempted because the decision not to publish is determined by campaign rules alone, independent of platform availability.
